title: The Ultra-Close Star

scenes.text: The closest known star, Proxima Centauri, is just over four light years away.
It’s part of a three-star system along with Alpha Centauri A and B.
Scientists discovered an Earth-sized exoplanet orbiting Proxima Centauri.
This planet raises questions about the potential for life.
scenes.label: POTENTIAL FOR LIFE!
scenes.sub: A world waiting to be explored

scenes.text: Follow if curiosity runs your brain.

description: Proxima Centauri, the closest star, features an Earth-sized exoplanet, sparking curiosity about potential life. Follow for daily science!
